description: Per-ADR-008 performance baselines updated only by an explicit --update-baseline run. CI compares latest results against 1.5× these numbers (Day 60 gate).

thresholds._note: Hard ADR-008 ceilings. CI fails if 1.5× baseline exceeds these. policyEval50RuleNs / redactionEval14RuleNs have no ADR-008 hard ceiling (the soft target 100µs / 50µs is informal); CI gates 1.5× regression of baseline only. fourPaneIdleRssFullMb shares the same 500MB ADR-008 #3 ceiling as fourPaneIdleRssMb but represents the App.Wpf descendant tree sum (WPF + WebView2 + xterm.js renderers), measured manually until App.Wpf launch automation lands.

notes.ptyReadWriteP95Ms: Day 55 — PtyReadWriteBench 64KB chunk mean (largest of 64B/8KB/64KB matrix). Host-side cycle only (rent → fill → wrap → Envelope.Output → return); pipe IO not modelled. ~13× headroom vs 5ms ceiling.
notes.fourPaneIdleRssMb: Day 56 — awt-perfprobe rss --panes 4. Host process RSS peak only (probe + 4 ConPTY childs); WPF/WebView2 contribution measured separately via fourPaneIdleRssFullMb. ~17× headroom vs 500MB ceiling on the daemon-side floor.
notes.fourPaneIdleRssFullMb: Maintenance slot (post-MVP-8) — awt-perfprobe rss-full --pid <App.Wpf PID>. Walks the descendant tree (WPF + WebView2 host/GPU/utility/renderer + ConPTY childs) and sums WorkingSet64. Shares the 500MB ADR-008 #3 ceiling with fourPaneIdleRssMb. null = not yet measured (requires manual App.Wpf launch with 4 panes loaded; baseline filled in once captured). Unblocks Native Renderer trigger per ADR-016 (70%-of-ceiling = 350MB).
notes.onePaneRssDeltaMb: Day 56 — awt-perfprobe rss --panes 1. Delta = peak - baseline (probe RSS before pane spawn). ~8× headroom vs 30MB ceiling.
notes.burstRender1MbMs: Day 57 — BurstRenderBench 1MB / 128× 8KB chunks mean (BDN ShortRun). End-to-end host-side time to publish 1MB through 128 PtyChunk → Envelope.Output cycles. 8KB outperformed 64KB chunks (5.64ms) due to lower per-chunk GC pressure. ~120× headroom vs 250ms ceiling.
notes.gcGen2PerMinuteIdle: Day 58 — awt-perfprobe gc-idle --seconds 60. Probe-self GC heap only (panes are separate processes with their own heaps); 0 Gen2 collections during the 60s window. The full workspace-idle GC budget needs in-App.Wpf sampling — this is the daemon-side floor.
notes.zombieChildren: Day 58 — awt-perfprobe zombies --panes 4 --settle-ms 500. Captures each PseudoConsoleProcess.ProcessId pre-kill, issues KillMode.Force on every pane, then re-resolves PIDs after 500ms. All 4 reaped cleanly via Job-Object teardown. PID-reuse race ignored (settle window << OS PID-recycle interval).
notes.policyEval50RuleNs: Day 59 — PolicyEvalBench Evaluate_Miss median (BDN ShortRun). PolicyEngine + Blacklists.SafeDev (50 rules). Worst-case = ExecuteCommand input falls through every regex with no match. First-rule hit was 126ns; last-rule hit was 3.16µs. Far below the per-action approval round-trip; no optimisation needed for MVP-8.
notes.redactionEval14RuleNs: Day 59 — RedactionEvalBench Redact_Bulk1Kb median (BDN ShortRun). RegexRedactionEngine.DefaultRules (14 patterns) over ~1KB plain text with no matches. Per-line worst (972ns) is the realistic streaming-log shape; the 1KB bulk number is recorded as the larger end of the streaming-text matrix. Single-token hit allocates 152B due to the substitution; misses are zero-alloc on the hot path.
